data.biography: O'Shea Jackson Sr. (born June 15, 1969), better known by his stage name Ice Cube, is an American rapper, record producer, and filmmaker. He began his career as a member of the hip-hop group C.I.A. and later joined N.W.A. He is known for his roles in the films “Boyz n the Hood,” “Friday,” the notorious remake of "War of the Worlds" and the “Jump Street” series.
data.name: Ice Cube

data.biography:
O'Shea Jackson Sr (Los Angeles, 15 de junho de 1969), mais conhecido pelo seu nome artístico Ice Cube, é um rapper, produtor musical, ator, escritor, comediante, produtor de filmes, e diretor norte-americano. Ele começou sua carreira em 1984 como membro do grupo C.I.A. e depois entrou para o grupo de gangsta rap N.W.A em 1986. Após ter deixado o N.W.A em dezembro de 1989,[2] ele construiu uma carreira solo bem sucedida na música, e também como escritor, diretor, ator e produtor no cinema. Adicionalmente, ele tem servido como um dos produtores da série de televisão da Showtime Barbershop e da série da TBS Are We There Yet?, ambas sendo baseadas em filmes onde ele atuou como o personagem principal.

Ele foi classificado número 9 na lista dos 10 Maiores MCs de Todos os Tempos da MTV, enquanto o próprio Snoop Dogg o elegeu o maior MC de todos os tempos.[3] About.com o classificou o número 11 na sua lista dos "50 Melhores MC's do Nosso Tempo".[4] Allmusic o chamou de um dos melhores e mais controversos artistas do hip-hop,[5] assim como "um dos melhores contadores de histórias do rap."[6] Em 2012, a revista The Source o classificou número 14 na sua lista dos 50 Melhores Letristas de Todos os Tempos.[7]

💥О’Ши Джексон, более известный как Айс Кьюб. Родился в 1969-ом году в Лос-Анджелесе, Калифорния, США. Рос в семье со старшим братом. Отец работал садовником, а мать была медсестрой. Учился в Технологическом институте Финикса. Работает рэпером, актёром, сценаристом, продюсером и кинорежиссёром. С 1992-го года женат на Кимберли Вудраф, у пары 4-о детей: сыновья О’Ши Джексон-младший, Даррелл и Шариф, а также дочь Карима

🏆Главные награды🏆: BET Hip Hop Awards (2009) [I Am the West], Звезда на Аллее славы в Голливуде (2017)

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Ребята по соседству» (1991), «Пятница» (1995), «Совместная поездка» (2014), «Анаконда» (1997), «Голос улиц» (2015)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: О’Ши начинал карьеру как участник легендарной хип-хоп группы N.W.A, которая считается родоначальницей жанра гангста-рэп
data.name: Айс Кьюб

data.biography:
Wprawdzie Ice Cube wychował się w najgorszej dzielnicy Los Angeles - South Central, ale nie był typowym dzieckiem ulicy. Jako jeden z nielicznych rapperów ma uniwersyteckie wykształcenie i dyplom inżyniera z wyróżnieniem.

Ice Cube naprawdę nazywa się O'Shea Jackson, a urodził się w 1969 r. Już w wieku 14 lat pisał pierwsze piosenki rapowe. Sławę zyskał jako członek kapeli N.W.A. (Niggaz With Attitude, czyli "dumne czarnuchy"). Za sprawą ich przeboju "Fuck the Police" w niektórych miastach w USA zabroniono mu występów. Ice Cube odszedł z kapeli po nagraniu drugiej płyty "Straight Outta Compton". Już pierwsza solowa płyta "Amerikkka's Most Wanted" przyniosła mu duży sukces. W ciągu pierwszych trzech tygodni sprzedano kilka milionów kopii, mimo iż numery z tego albumu w ogóle nie były prezentowane w radiu. W tym samym roku pojawił się singiel "Kill At Will", a zaraz potem ukazała się druga płyta "Death Certificate".

Ice Cube'a można było oglądać w takich filmach jak "Wstęp wzbroniony", "Chłopcy z sąsiedztwa", "Studenci", "Anakonda", czy w jednym z najlepszych filmów w jego karierze aktorskiej "Piątek".
美国说唱歌手、唱片制作人、演员、编剧、电影制片人和导演N.W.A.。
data.name: 艾斯·库珀

data.biography:
Ice Cube, bürgerlich O’Shea Jackson (* 15. Juni 1969 in Baldwin Hills, Los Angeles, Kalifornien), ist ein US-amerikanischer Rapper, Songwriter, Schauspieler und Filmproduzent. Er war Mitglied der Hip-Hop-Gruppen N.W.A und Westside Connection und veröffentlichte zehn Soloalben. Neben der musikalischen Karriere spielte er in mehreren Filmen mit, unter anderem in der Reihe der Friday- und Barbershop-Filme, die er auch produzierte und bei denen er am Drehbuch mitschrieb. 2016 wurde bekannt, dass Ice Cube als eine von 683 Persönlichkeiten von der Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences als Neumitglied eingeladen wurde.

Aus Wikipedia, der freien Enzyklopädie
美國説唱歌手、唱片製作人、演員、編劇、電影製片人和導演 N.W. A. 。
data.name: 艾斯·庫伯

data.biography:
Ice Cube (O’Shea Jackson Sr.) est né le 15 juin 1969 à Los Angeles. Il débute comme rappeur au sein de N.W.A, groupe pionnier du gangsta rap à la fin des années 1980. Après avoir marqué la musique avec des albums solo à succès, il se tourne vers le cinéma au début des années 1990. Son premier rôle marquant est dans "Boyz n the Hood" (1991) de John Singleton, qui lance sa carrière d’acteur. Par la suite, il alterne films dramatiques, comédies et productions familiales, tout en continuant sa carrière musicale et de producteur.

Ensuite, il joue dans Friday (1995), Barbershop (2002), 21 Jump Street (2012) et Ride Along (2014).

Il est aujourd’hui reconnu comme l’une des figures majeures de la culture hip-hop et du cinéma américain.

data.biography:
木内秀信（日语：木内 秀信／きうち ひでのぶ Kiuchi Hidenobu，1969年2月5日—）是日本男性声优。所属公司为大泽事务所。出生于兵库县神户市。身高177cm，体重80kg。

声优代表作有《网球王子系列》（忍足侑士）、《家庭教师HITMAN REBORN!》（笹川了平）。

data.biography: Ramón Rodríguez (born December 20, 1979) is a Puerto Rican-American actor. He is best known for his TV roles as the title character on “Will Trent,” Ben Cruz on “The Affair,” Bakuto on Marvel's “Iron Fist” and “The Defenders,”and Renaldo on “The Wire.” In film, he is best known for his roles in “Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen,” “The One and Only Ivan,” “Need for Speed,” and “Battle Los Angeles.”
data.name: Ramón Rodríguez

data.biography:
拉蒙·罗德里格斯 （Ramón Rodríguez） 是一位波多黎各裔美国演员，可能最出名的是他在威尔·特伦特 （Will Trent） 中的主角、《外遇》中的本·克鲁兹 （Ben Cruz）、漫威《铁拳》和漫威《捍卫者》中的巴库托、福克斯 （FOX） 的《帮派相关》中的侦探瑞安·洛佩兹、美国广播公司 （ABC） 2011 年翻拍的《查理的天使》中的约翰·博斯利、HBO 的《火线》中的雷纳尔多、 和达米安·奥尔蒂斯（Damien Ortiz）在ABC的Day Break上。

他最著名的电影角色是《变形金刚：堕落者的复仇》中的里奥·斯皮茨、《唯一的伊万》中的乔治、《梅根·利维》中的马特·莫拉莱斯上尉、《极品飞车》中的乔·派克、《洛杉矶之战》中的威廉·马丁内斯和《骄傲与荣耀》中的安吉尔·泰佐，
data.name: 拉蒙·罗德里格斯

data.biography:
Ramón Rodríguez jest portorykańsko-amerykańskim aktorem, prawdopodobnie najbardziej znanym z ról telewizyjnych: tytułowej postaci w Will Trent, Bena Cruza w Romans, Bakuto w Iron Fist i The Defenders Marvela, detektywa Ryana Lopeza w Piętno gangu stacji FOX, Johna Bosleya w remake'u Aniołki Charliego stacji ABC z 2011 r., Renaldo w Prawo ulicy stacji HBO i Damiena Ortiza w Day Break stacji ABC.

Jego najbardziej znane role filmowe to Leo Spitz w Transformers: Zemsta upadłych, George w edyny i niepowtarzalny Ivan, kapral Matt Morales w Meagan Leavey, Joe Peck w Need for Speed, 2LT William Martinez w Inwazja: Bitwa o Los Angeles i Angel Tezo w W cieniu chwały.

拉蒙·洛迪文裏格斯 （Ramón Rodríguez） 是一位波多黎各裔美國演員，可能最出名的是他在威爾·特倫特 （Will Trent） 中的主角、《外遇》中的本·克魯茲 （Ben Cruz）、漫威《鐵拳無敵》和漫威《捍衞者》中的巴庫託、福克斯 （FOX） 的《幫派相關》中的偵探瑞安·洛佩茲、美國廣播公司 （ABC） 2011 年翻拍的《查理的天使》中的約翰·博斯利、HBO 的《火線》中的雷納爾多、 和達米安·奧爾蒂斯（Damien Ortiz）在 ABC 的 Day Break 上。

他最著名的電影角色是《變形金剛：墮落者的復仇》中的里奧·斯皮茨、《唯一的伊萬》中的喬治、《梅根·利維》中的馬特·莫拉萊斯上尉、《極品飛車》中的喬·派克、《異形侵略戰》中的威廉·馬丁內斯和《驕傲與榮耀》中的安吉爾·泰佐，
data.name: 拉蒙·洛迪文裏格斯

data.original_title: 오늘 밤, 세계에서 이 사랑이 사라진다 해도
data.overview: Một nữ sinh cấp ba thức dậy mỗi ngày mà không nhớ gì về hôm qua. Khi cô đồng ý hẹn hò với cậu bạn học nhút nhát, liệu tình yêu của họ có thể nảy nở qua từng khởi đầu mới?
data.title: Đêm nay dẫu tình yêu này biến mất khỏi thế gian

data.biography:
Amy Marie Madigan (born September 11, 1950) is an American actress. She has acted on stage and screen, and has received a Golden Globe Award, an Academy Award, as well as nominations for an Emmy Award. She has been married to actor Ed Harris since 1983. 

Madigan made her film debut in the drama Love Child (1982), for which she was nominated for the Golden Globe Award for New Star of the Year – Actress. For playing a woman in a difficult marriage in the drama film Twice in a Lifetime (1985), she earned a nomination for the Academy Award and Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actress. She has also acted in Love Letters (1984), Alamo Bay (1985), Nowhere to Hide (1987), Uncle Buck (1989), Field of Dreams (1989), Female Perversions (1996), Pollock (2000), and Gone Baby Gone (2007). After a lack of "meaningful roles", she gained newfound attention for her performance in the horror film Weapons (2025).

On television, Madigan portrayed Sarah Weddington in the television film Roe vs. Wade (1989), for which she won the Golden Globe Award and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award. She also took roles in the HBO series Carnivàle (2003–2005), Grey's Anatomy (2008–2009), and Fringe (2009). On stage, she has acted in the Off-Broadway production of The Lucky Spot (1987), for which she was nominated for the Drama Desk Award for Outstanding Actress in a Play, and a 1992 Broadway production of A Streetcar Named Desire in the role of Stella Kowalski.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Amy Madigan, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Amy Madigan

data.biography: Norika Fujiwara ( born on June 28, 1971 in Nishinomiya, Hyōgo Prefecture) is a Japanese beauty queen, model and actress. She became Miss Japan in 1992 and was an exclusive model for CanCam magazine. She has appeared in various commercials and TV series and a number of films in Japan.

data.biography: 藤原纪香（1971年6月28日出生于兵库县西宫市）是日本选美皇后、模特和演员。她于 1992 年成为日本小姐，并且是 CanCam 杂志的独家模特。她曾出演过日本的各种广告和电视剧以及多部电影。
data.name: 藤原纪香

data.biography: 藤原紀香（1971 年 6 月 28 日出生於兵庫縣西宮市）是日本選美皇后、模特和演員。她於 1992 年成為日本小姐，並且是 CanCam 雜誌的獨家模特。她曾出演過日本的各種廣告和電視劇以及多部電影。

data.biography:
Robert Frank Broski is an actor and professional Abraham Lincoln, he's known for his role as the Woodsman in Twin Peaks: The Return (2017)

Broski worked in construction and became a background actor in retirement after finding a newspaper advertisement for a background talent agency. Since discovering his resemblance to Abraham Lincoln, he has appeared as the sixteenth president in numerous films and television series, and is often booked for parades, school presentations, and other events.
data.name: Robert Broski

data.biography:
Timothée Hal Chalamet (born December 27, 1995) is an American and French actor. Known for his work in a diverse range of blockbusters and independent films, he is the recipient of numerous accolades including an Actor Award, a Golden Globe Award, and two Critics' Choice Awards, in addition to nominations for four Academy Awards, six British Academy Film Awards, and a Grammy Award. His films as a leading actor have grossed over $2.3 billion worldwide.

Chalamet began his career in television, appearing in the drama series Homeland. In 2014, while a student at Columbia University, he made his film debut in the comedy-drama Men, Women & Children and appeared in Christopher Nolan's science fiction film Interstellar. Chalamet came to international attention with the lead role of a lovestruck teenager in Luca Guadagnino's coming-of-age film Call Me by Your Name (2017), earning him his first nomination for the Academy Award for Best Actor, and becoming the third-youngest nominee in the category. He gained further recognition for his supporting roles in Greta Gerwig's films Lady Bird (2017) and Little Women (2019), as well as for portraying Nic Sheff in the biopic Beautiful Boy (2018).

Chalamet began leading big-budget films, starring as Paul Atreides in Denis Villeneuve's Dune films (2021–2024) and Willy Wonka in the musical fantasy film Wonka (2023). He earned consecutive Academy Award nominations for his portrayal of Bob Dylan in the biographical drama A Complete Unknown (2024) and his starring role as a table tennis player in Josh Safdie's sports comedy film Marty Supreme (2025); the former also earned him the SAG Award for Best Actor, while the latter won him the Critics' Choice Award for Best Actor and the Golden Globe Award for Best Actor in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy, making him the youngest recipient of each award.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Timothée Chalamet, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Timothée Chalamet

data.biography:
Timothée Chalamet é um ator americano. Ele é mais conhecido por interpretar Elio, no filme "Me Chame pelo Seu Nome/Call Me by Your Name" (2017), pelo qual foi indicado ao Oscar de Melhor Ator; e Kyle Scheible, "Lady Bird: É Hora de Voar/Lady Bird" (2017).

Por "Me Chame pelo Seu Nome/Call Me by Your Name", ele foi indicado ao prêmio de Melhor Ator no Golden Globes, USA; BAFTA Awards; Screen Actors Guild Awards; entre outros, venceu na mesma categoria no New York Film Critics Circle Awards; New York Film Critics, Online; Boston Online Film Critics Association; Chicago Film Critics Association Awards; Florida Film Critics Circle Awards; Gotham Awards; Hamptons International Film Festival; Hollywood Film Awards; Houston Film Critics Society Awards;Kansas City Film Critics Circle Awards; National Board of Review, USA; Los Angeles Film Critics Association Awards; Palm Springs International Film Festival; entre muitos outros...

O ator Timothée Chalamet, que depois que estrelou o longa ‘Me Chame Pelo Seu Nome’, se pronunciou sobre como foi trabalhar com Woody Allen no, ainda inédito, ‘A Rainy Day in New York’. O ator usou seu Instagram para postar um texto em que confirma que doará seu salário recebido pelo filme para três instituições que incentivam a luta contra a desigualdade e a injustiça.

No palco, Chalamet estrelou a peça autobiográfica de John Patrick Shanley , Prodigal Son , pelo qual foi indicado para o Prêmio Drama League por Distinguished Performance e ganhou o Prêmio Lucille Lortel pelo Ator principal destacado em uma peça de teatro .

Chalamet nasceu e cresceu em Hell's Kitchen, bairro de Manhattan, na cidade de Nova Iorque. Filho de Nicole Flender e Marc Chalamet, seu tio Rodman Flender é diretor e seu avô Harold Flender era roteirista. Seu pai é francês e sua mãe descendente de austro-russos judeus. Frequentou a Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School e atualmente estuda na Gallatin.

💥Тимоти Хэл Шаламе. Родился в 1995-ом году в Нью-Йорке, США. Рос в семье со старшей сестрой. Отец работал переводчиком, а мать была танцовщицей. Учился в Колумбийском университете. Работает актёром. С 2025-го состоит в отношениях с моделью Кайли Дженнер

🏆Главные награды🏆: Золотой глобус (2026) [Марти Великолепный], ASTRA (2026) [Марти Великолепный], Critics’ Choice Awards (2026) [Марти Великолепный], Независимый дух (2018) [Назови меня своим именем], Готэм (2017) [Назови меня своим именем]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Марти Великолепный» (2025), «Назови меня своим именем» (2017), «Красивый мальчик» (2018), «Маленькие женщины» (2019), «Дюна» (2021), «Вонка» (2023)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: В подростковом возрасте Тимоти вёл YouTube-канал под названием ModdedController360, где показывал созданные им кастомные геймпады для Xbox. Он раскрасил всего 3 контроллера, заработал на этом около 30 долларов и бросил занятие после просьбы родителей, потому как  весь дом был в краске от баллончиков
data.name: Тимоти Шаламе

data.biography: 出生于1995年12月27日的提莫西·查拉梅(Timothée Chalamet)是一名美国演员。由于出演了美剧《国土安全(Homeland)》第二季中副总统的儿子Finn Walden而为人熟悉。之后又参演过贾森·雷特曼的《男人女人和孩子》，以及诺兰的《星际穿越》。2017年，他在格蕾塔·葛韦格(Greta Gerwig)的导演处女作《伯德小姐(Lady Bird)》和斯科特·库珀(Scott Cooper)的《敌对分子(Hostiles)》担任配角，因此获得了更广泛的认可。此外，他在卢卡·瓜达尼诺(Luca Guadagnino)的爱情电影《请以你的名字呼唤我(Call Me by Your Name)》中担任主角，这一角色为他赢得了多个奖项的最佳男演员奖提名。他是奥斯卡最佳男演员奖自1939年以来最年轻的提名者。在舞台上，查拉梅出演了约翰·帕特里克·尚利(John Patrick Shanley)的自传剧《Prodigal Son》，为此他得到了剧评联盟杰出表演奖的提名，并获得了Lucille Lortel奖的杰出首席演员奖。
data.name: 提莫西·查拉梅

data.biography:
Timothée Hal Chalamet (* 27. Dezember 1995 in New York City, New York) ist ein US-amerikanisch-französischer Schauspieler.

2012 war er in der Spionageserie Homeland als Finn Walden, der Sohn des US-amerikanischen Vizepräsidenten, zu sehen. 2014 gelang ihm dann auch im Film der Durchbruch. So spielte er die Rolle des jungen Tom, den Sohn der Hauptfigur Cooper, in Christopher Nolans Science-Fiction-Film Interstellar.

2017 war er in Filmen wie Lady Bird und Call Me by Your Name zu sehen. Für seine Darstellungen erhielt er jeweils viel Kritikerlob und konnte für letzteren Film auch Preise, etwa den Los Angeles Film Critics Association Award als Bester Hauptdarsteller gewinnen. Er ist die jüngste Person seit Mickey Rooney im Jahr 1940, der für einen Oscar als Bester Hauptdarsteller nominiert wurde.

2019 feierte das Historiendrama The King bei den Internationalen Filmfestspiele von Venedig seine Premiere. Chalamet übernimmt darin die Hauptrolle des jungen Königs Heinrich V..

Quelle: Wikipedia

Né et élevé à Manhattan, Timothée Chalamet évolue dans le milieu artistique dès son plus jeune âge. D’ascendance américaine et russe par sa mère et française par son père, il apparaît très tôt dans des publicités ainsi que sur la scène théâtrale new-yorkaise. C’est en 2008 qu’il fait ses premiers pas à l’écran, tout d’abord dans des courts métrages horrifiques (Sweet Tooth, Clown) puis à la télévision dans les séries New York Police judiciaire et Royal Pains. Mais c’est en 2012 qu’il se fait remarquer : alors qu’il étudie à La Guardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts à New York, il décroche le rôle de Finn Walden, le fils du vice-président, dans la deuxième saison de Homeland.

Deux ans plus tard, c’est au cinéma qu’il fait ses armes, tout d’abord dans le film choral Men, Women & Children de Jason Reitman où il donne la réplique à son ami Ansel Elgort qu’il a rencontré à La Guardia High School of Music & Art. La même année, il apparaît dans le premier blockbuster de sa jeune carrière : Christopher Nolan le choisit pour incarner le fils de Matthew McConaughey dans Interstellar. Suivent des productions indépendantes inédites en France (One & Two, Miss Stevens, Hot Summer Nights dont il tient le premier rôle).

En 2018, son nom est sur toutes les lèvres grâce à trois films - dont deux nommés aux Oscars - qui lui permettent de s'illustrer dans des registres variés. Il incarne tout d'abord Kyle, un lycéen ténébreux qui fait tourner la tête de Lady Bird dans la première réalisation solo de Greta Gerwig, puis se glisse dans la peau d'un soldat dans le western crépusculaire Hostiles où il donne la réplique à Christian Bale. Mais c'est surtout grâce à Call Me By Your Name qu'il explose aux yeux du grand public. Cette histoire d'amour homosexuelle et charnelle mise en scène par Luca Guadagnino lui offre l'occasion d'interpréter - en italien, en anglais et en français - un adolescent qui connaît ses premiers émois sexuels en même temps que sa première peine de coeur. Il décroche, à 22 ans seulement, sa première nomination à l'Oscar du meilleur acteur face à des pointures telles que Denzel Washington, Gary Oldman et Daniel Day-Lewis.  Il enchaîne depuis les projets, de la comédie romantique Un jour de pluie à New York du controversé Woody Allen au drame My Beautiful Boy où il est le fils toxicomane de Steve Carell, en passant par la fresque historique Netflix Le Roi. Il retrouve en 2020 Greta Gerwig pour une nouvelle adaptation des Quatre Filles du Docteur March où il donne encore la réplique à Saoirse Ronan.  En 2021, le jeune comédien est à l'affiche de deux films événements : The French Dispatch, film choral de Wes Anderson à l'impressionnant casting (Bill Murray, Tilda Swinton, Owen Wilson, Frances McDormand, entre autres) et Dune, adapté du monument de la SF de Frank Herbert. Pour la première fois de sa jeune carrière, Timothée Chalamet est la tête d'affiche d'une grosse production dotée d'un budget de 165 millions de dollars. Il succède à Kyle MacLachlan dans le rôle de Paul Atreides, plus de 35 ans après le film de David Lynch.  L'acteur n'est pas près d'arrêter son ascension : on l'attend dans les prochains projets de Luca Guadagnino (la suite de Call Me By Your Name et le film d'horreur Bones & All) ainsi que dans Wonka, consacré aux origines du chocolatier Willy Wonka.

Timothée Hal Chalamet (27 de Diciembre, 1995) es un actor estadounidense. Chalamet inició su carrera en cortometrajes, previo a su participación en el drama de televisión Homeland. Su debut en largometrajes fue con el drama de Jason Reitman, Men, Women & Children (2014), y ese mismo año participó en la película de ciencia ficción de Christopher Nolan, Interstellar (2014).

En 2017,  consiguió mayor repercusión tras su rol secundario en el debut como directora de Greta Gerwig, Lady Bird, y por su papel como Elio Perlman en Call Me By Your Name de Luca Guadagnino. Por esta última consiguió múltiples nominaciones, incluyendo al  Premio de la Academia, el Premio Globo de Oro, los Premios del Sindicato de Actores y los Premios BAFTA en la categoría Mejor Actor. Es el tercer nominado más joven para el Premio de la Academia a Mejor Actor, y el más joven desde 1939.

En teatro, Chalamet ha participado en la comedia autobiográfica de John Patrick Shanley, Prodigal Son, por la cual fue nominado para el Premio de la Liga de Drama y ganó el Premio Lucille Lortel en la categoría Mejor Actor Principal en una Obra.

Timothée Hal Chalamet es un actor estadounidense. Chalamet comenzó su carrera como actor en cortometrajes y comerciales, antes de aparecer en la serie dramática de televisión Homeland en 2012. Dos años más tarde, hizo su debut cinematográfico en la comedia dramática Men, Women & Children y posteriormente apareció en la película de ciencia ficción Interstellar.

Descripción anterior del artículo de Wikipedia Timothée Chamalet, con licencia CC-BY-SA 3.0 ES, lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

data.name: ティモシー・シャラメ

data.biography:
Timothée Hal Chalamet, 27 Aralık 1995 tarihinde New York City'de, sanatla yakından ilişkili bir ailede dünyaya gözlerini açtı. Babası Fransız kökenli bir UNICEF editörü olan Marc Chalamet, annesi ise eski bir Broadway dansçısı ve şimdilerde emlakçılık yapan Nicole Flender'dır. Sanatçı bir aileden gelmesi (kız kardeşi Pauline de bir aktristir) ve New York'un ünlü sanat okulu Fiorello H. LaGuardia Müzik & Sanat ve Sahne Sanatları Lisesi'nde eğitim görmesi, onun oyunculuk yeteneğini erken yaşlarda beslemesine yardımcı oldu.

Profesyonel oyunculuk kariyerine çocuk yaşta reklam filmleri ve kısa filmlerle adım atan Chalamet, televizyon dünyasındaki ilk dikkat çekici rolünü 2012 yılında Showtime dizisi Homeland'de canlandırdığı, Başkan Yardımcısı'nın oğlu Finn Walden karakteriyle elde etti. Sinemaya geçişi ise Jason Reitman'ın Men, Women & Children (2014) filmindeki küçük bir rolle ve ardından Christopher Nolan'ın büyük bütçeli bilim kurgusu Interstellar (Yıldızlararası, 2014)'da Matthew McConaughey'nin karakterinin genç oğlunu oynamasıyla gerçekleşti.

Chalamet için uluslararası şöhretin kapılarını ardına kadar açan ve onu bir anda Hollywood'un en parlak genç yıldızlarından biri haline getiren yapım, 2017 tarihli Luca Guadagnino filmi Call Me by Your Name (Beni Adınla Çağır) oldu. İtalya'da geçen bu dokunaklı büyüme hikayesinde canlandırdığı 17 yaşındaki Elio Perlman karakteriyle sergilediği olağanüstü performans, ona dünya çapında övgü kazandırdı ve En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü adaylığı getirdi. Bu adaylık, onu Oscar tarihinde bu kategoride aday gösterilen en genç üçüncü isim yaptı. Aynı yıl, eleştirmenlerce beğenilen Greta Gerwig imzalı Lady Bird (Uğur Böceği) filmindeki Kyle rolüyle de başarısını pekiştirdi.

Bu hızlı yükselişin ardından Chalamet, kuşağının en yetenekli ve aranan aktörlerinden biri olarak konumunu sağlamlaştırdı. Uyuşturucu bağımlılığıyla mücadele eden bir genci canlandırdığı Beautiful Boy (2018) filmindeki performansıyla Altın Küre'ye aday gösterildi. Greta Gerwig ile Little Women (Küçük Kadınlar, 2019)'da yeniden bir araya gelerek Laurie Laurence karakterine hayat verdi. Netflix için çekilen tarihi drama The King (2019)'da İngiltere Kralı V. Henry'yi canlandırdı. Ancak onu küresel bir gişe yıldızı statüsüne taşıyan en önemli adımlardan biri, Denis Villeneuve'ün yönettiği epik bilim kurgu uyarlaması Dune oldu. Serinin ilk filmi (2021) ve devam filmi Dune: Part Two (2024)'da canlandırdığı Paul Atreides karakteriyle büyük beğeni topladı. Ayrıca, Roald Dahl'ın klasik karakterine yeni bir yorum getiren Wonka (2023) müzikalinde başrolü üstlenerek şarkı söyleme ve dans etme yeteneklerini de ortaya koydu.

Timothée Chalamet, genellikle hassas, duygusal derinliği olan ve karmaşık iç dünyalara sahip karakterleri canlandırmadaki ustalığıyla öne çıkar. Genç yaşına rağmen sergilediği olgun oyunculuk, farklı türler arasında rahatlıkla geçiş yapabilmesi ve kendine has karizmasıyla hem eleştirmenlerin hem de geniş izleyici kitlelerinin takdirini kazanmıştır. Aynı zamanda bir stil ikonu olarak da kabul edilen Chalamet, modern sinemanın en heyecan verici ve etkili genç yeteneklerinden biri olarak görülmekte ve kariyerine iddialı projelerle devam etmektedir.
data.name: Timothee Chalamet

data.biography: Timothée Hal Chalamet (Manhattan, Nova York, 27 de desembre de 1995) és un actor francoestatunidenc. Va començar a actuar en pel·lícules curtes abans d'aparèixer a la sèrie de televisió dramàtica "Homeland" el 2012.

Timothée Hal Chalamet ( 27. prosince 1995 New York, stát New York) je americko-francouzský herec. Hereckou kariéru začal rolemi v krátkých filmech, později se objevil v seriálu Ve jménu vlasti. V celovečerním filmu debutoval dramatem Muži, ženy a děti (2014) Jasona Reitmana. Objevil se také ve science-fiction Christophera Nolana Interstellar (2014).

V roce 2017 sklidil uznání za výkon v rolích ve filmech Lady Bird režisérky Grety Gerwigové, ve westernu Hostiles režiséra Scotta Coopera i za romantický film Dej mi své jméno, kterého se ujal italský režisér Luca Guadagnino. Za tento snímek byl nominován na Zlatý glóbus, BAFTA a mimo jiné také na Oscara za nejlepší mužský herecký výkon v hlavní roli.

data.name: ทิโมธี ชาลาเมต์

data.biography: 出生於 1995 年 12 月 27 日的添麥菲·查洛美 (Timothée Chalamet) 是一名美國演員。由於出演了美劇《國土安全 (Homeland)》第二季中副總統的兒子 Finn Walden 而為人熟悉。之後又參演過賈森·雷特曼的《男人女人和孩子》，以及諾蘭的《星際穿越》。2017 年，他在格蕾塔·葛韋格 (Greta Gerwig) 的導演處女作《伯德小姐 (Lady Bird)》和斯科特·庫珀 (Scott Cooper) 的《敵對分子 (Hostiles)》擔任配角，因此獲得了更廣泛的認可。此外，他在盧卡·瓜達尼諾 (Luca Guadagnino) 的愛情電影《請以你的名字呼喚我 (Call Me by Your Name)》中擔任主角，這一角色為他贏得了多個獎項的最佳男演員獎提名。他是奧斯卡最佳男演員獎自 1939 年以來最年輕的提名者。在舞台上，查洛美出演了約翰·帕特里克·尚利 (John Patrick Shanley) 的自傳劇《Prodigal Son》，為此他得到了劇評聯盟傑出表演獎的提名，並獲得了 Lucille Lortel 獎的傑出首席演員獎。
data.name: 添麥菲·查洛美

data.biography:
Timothée Hal Chalamet (ur. 27 grudnia 1995) jest amerykańskim aktorem.

Rozpoczął karierę występując w serialu dramatycznym Homeland w 2012 roku. Dwa lata później zadebiutował w komediodramacie Uwiązani  i wystąpił w filmie science fiction Christophera Nolana Interstellar. Zwrócił na siebie uwagę w filmie o dorastaniu Luki Guadagnino Tamte dni, tamte noce (2017). Oprócz ról drugoplanowych w filmach Grety Gerwig Lady Bird (2017) i Małe kobietki (2019), zagrał główne role w Piękny chłopiec (2018) i Diuna (2021).

丁冠森，1993年6月11日出生于黑龙江省，中国内地影视男演员，毕业于中国传媒大学。

2015年，出演个人首部影视剧《女仆咖啡厅》，从而正式进入演艺圈；同年，出演个人首部电影《谁的青春不迷茫》。2016年，推出首支个人单曲《头大的爱情》；同年，主演青春校园电影《青禾男高》 。2017年，在古装武侠剧《笑傲江湖》中饰演男主角令狐冲。
data.name: 丁冠森

data.biography:
丁冠森，1993 年 6 月 11 日出生於黑龍江省，中國內地影視男演員，畢業於中國傳媒大學。

2015 年，出演個人首部影視劇《女僕咖啡廳》，從而正式進入演藝圈；同年，出演個人首部電影《誰的青春不迷茫》。2016 年，推出首支個人單曲《頭大的愛情》；同年，主演青春校園電影《青禾男高》 。2017 年，在古裝武俠劇《笑傲江湖》中飾演男主角令狐沖。
data.name: 丁冠森

data.biography: 外形娇媚、性格柔顺的龚慈恩是香港著名女星，她在台湾40集电视连续剧《雪山飞狐》中一人分饰两个角色——聪明机智的程灵素和娇柔俏丽的冰雪儿，令大陆观众为之着迷。1997年，龚慈恩接拍亚视武侠巨作《雪花神剑》，成功演绎了剧中女主角聂小凤瑰丽多情的一生，其精湛演技更凭借该人物的复杂丰满而大鸣大放，广受美评，并为雪花一剧及亚视博得崇高赞誉和巨大深远的人文影响。
data.name: 龚慈恩

data.biography: Mimi Kung Chi-Yan is a Chinese film and television actress.
data.name: Mimi Kung

data.biography: 龔慈恩，香港女演員以及主持，舊名龔施茜，暱稱公仔，前亞洲電視女藝員；是現任無綫電視非戲劇組合約藝員。現為銀河海潤旗下藝員。
data.name: 龔慈恩

data.biography: 張鴻昌出生於香港，原籍貫於廣東省東莞市，他早年於九龍黃大仙東頭邨 23 座長大及生活，至 1970 年代於佳藝電視出道，開始於劇集中演出配角。1978 年佳視倒閉後，翌年後開始成為麗的電視藝員之一，曾演出大量綠葉角色。1989 年初轉至無綫電視，其後一直在無綫電視工作至 2003 年後淡出，現時至今居住於澳洲坎培拉。其最擅長於演繹反派角色。八字鬍是其最顯眼的標誌。
data.name: 張鴻昌

data.biography:
Siti Hafar Raihaanun Nabila HM is an Indonesian film, television and commercial actress. Her name began to be known since starring in the film Badai Pasti Berlalu (2007). The Bugis-Minangkabau blooded woman shocked the public with her decision to get married at the age of 18, when her career has just flown. She is the niece of designer Itang Yunasz.

Raihaanun who is familiarly called 'Haanun', began her career as a GADIS Sampul finalist 2003. After that, Haanun starred in several commercials and soap operas. Some soap operas starring the 6 youngest siblings Hazier Moein-Yulia Farahdibha, among others, Sepatu Kaca, Kawin Gantung, Julia Jadi Anak Gedongan, and My Prince n My Monster. Her name began to soar when starring in the remake of Badai Pasti Berlalu (2007). She's playing in the Yanina Cinta soap operas from Prima Entertainment on SCTV in 2002.

The girl who has a 164 cm tall and weighing 47 kg was recorded as a student of Interior Design at the University of Pelita Harapan Karawaci in 2007.

Raihaanun married to Teddy Soeriaatmadja, director of the film Badai Pasti Berlalu (2007 film) on March 17, 2007. At January 16, 2008 Haanun gave birth to a son, Millan Haruna Soeriaatmadja.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Raihaanun
